dict.string: Apple PIM Helper needs full Calendar access to read and manage events on behalf of the Apple PIM plugin.
Apple PIM Helper needs Calendar access to read and manage events on behalf of the Apple PIM plugin.
Apple PIM Helper needs full Reminders access to read and manage reminders on behalf of the Apple PIM plugin.
Apple PIM Helper needs Reminders access to read and manage reminders on behalf of the Apple PIM plugin.
Apple PIM Helper needs Contacts access to read and manage contacts on behalf of the Apple PIM plugin.
